title: Add AI City Diorama Generator to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Miniature metropolis
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped. The AI City Diorama Generator builds cinematic miniature cities and auto-publishes them to YouTube Shorts using n8n.
gist.summary: Added the AI City Diorama Generator to the community showcase, featuring an automated n8n workflow that generates cinematic miniature cities and publishes them to YouTube Shorts.
gist.impact: Creators can now explore a fully automated pipeline for generating and publishing AI-crafted diorama videos.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a miniature city diorama generator and video automation. The visual should feature Polly the bee looking at or building a tiny, glowing pixel-art city diorama on a table. The Monitor Robot is filming it to represent the YouTube Shorts automation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, carefully arranging a glowing miniature city diorama on a wooden table. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny video camera. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
